en: That's Abagnale, not Abagnale, not Abagnale, but Abagnale.
Now, somebody please tell me where you left off in your textbooks.
ko: 자, 누가 교과서의 어디까지 했는지 말해줄 수 있나요?

en: Excuse me, people, if I need to ask again, I'm going to write up the entire class.
ko: 죄송하지만, 다시 물어봐야 한다면 전체 수업을 기록할 것입니다.

en: Will you please open your textbooks to chapter eight, and we'll get started.
Excuse me, what's your name? Brad.
Brad, why don't you get up here in front of the class here and read conversation number
ko: 브래드, 여기 앞으로 나와서 대화 번호를 읽어보세요.
